### NOTELLM_MANIFEST ###
# notellm Managed Files Manifest
# This file defines all files/patterns created and managed by notellm
# Used by: 'notellm clean --purge' and .gitignore generation
#
# Format: Standard .gitignore syntax
# - Patterns are evaluated as shell globs
# - Lines starting with # are comments
# - Empty lines are ignored

# Python environment
.venv
__pycache__
*.py[cod]

# Jupyter runtime files
.env.jupyter
.jupyter.pid
.jupyter.log
.jupyter*

# Jupyter checkpoints (auto-generated)
.ipynb_checkpoints
*.ipynb_checkpoints

# notellm configuration files
CLAUDE.md
.claude
.notellm_template.ipynb
pyproject.toml
uv.lock

# MCP configuration
.mcp.json

# Patch backups
*.backup

# Test files
TestSuite.ipynb

# Local overrides (not tracked in git)
.claude/settings.local.json
.env

# IDE directories
.vscode
.idea

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
